title: “Charlie was appointed”: Candace Owens’ Erika Kirk criticism backfires as Linda Yaccarino and Laura Loomer turn on her
summary_full: A social media clash erupted after Candace Owens criticized Erika Kirk being appointed to the United States Air Force Academy Board of Visitors. Former X CEO Linda Yaccarino replied, “Stop. Just stop,” while Laura Loomer added she was “shocked” Owens had not been banned. The debate quickly spread across social media.
